emergency_routing_rules: Call Jason first at 404-555-0128. If he doesn't answer within 50 seconds, try Danielle at 404-555-0174. If neither answers, the system should record a message and mark it as high priority.
non_emergency_routing_rules: Wait until the next business day. A call summary should be sent by text to the operations coordinator at 404-555-0601.
call_transfer_rules: Transfer directly to reception desk at 404-555-0110. If no answer after 25 seconds, agent should take a voicemail.
integration_constraints: Automatically create jobs for emergency lighting inspections. Do not auto-create fire pump service jobs — those should still require manual approval.
after_hours_flow_summary: Non-emergency calls wait until the next business day. Text summary sent to operations coordinator at 404-555-0601.
office_hours_flow_summary: Transfer to reception at 404-555-0110. Voicemail if no answer after 25 seconds.
questions_or_unknowns: Potential migration from ServiceTrade to Jobber later this year.
